failed_attempts:
let m := n + 1
  let Z := rewardByCount A R a m
  let T := fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a m ω.1
  let Ys := fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω
  have hm : m ≠ 0 := by simp [m]
  -- We show Z is independent of (Ys, T), which implies Z is independent of Ys.
  apply (IndepFun.of_measurable (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).comp _ measurable_fst measurable_id
  rw [indepFun_iff_condDistrib_eq_const (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  refine (condDistrib_ae_eq_cond (μ := 𝔓') (X := Prod.mk Ys T) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).trans ?_
  -- We show the conditional distribution is constant ν a
  simp only [Kernel.const_apply]
  rw [Filter.EventuallyEq, ae_iff_of_countable]
  rintro t ht
  cases t with
  | top =>
    -- Case T = ∞. Z is independent of Ys and T.
    -- Z is ω.2 m a. Ys and T depend on A, R, and ω.2 i a (i < m).
    rw [Measure.map_congr (g := fun ω ↦ ω.2 m a)]
    swap; · refine ae_cond_of_forall_mem ((measurableSet_singleton _).preimage (by fun_prop)) ?_
            simp [T]; intro ω hω; exact rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_top
    rw [cond_of_indepFun (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
    · exact (hasLaw_Z a m).map_eq
    · exact ht
    · exact indepFun_prod_snd (Measurable.aemeasurable (by fun_prop)) (by fun_prop)
  | coe k =>
    -- Case T = k. Z is R k. Ys is hist(k-1)-measurable.
    rw [Measure.map_congr (g := fun ω ↦ R k ω.1)]
    swap; · refine ae_cond_of_forall_mem ((measurableSet_singleton _).preimage (by fun_prop)) ?_
            simp [T]; intro ω hω; exact rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe _ _ _ _ hω
    -- We use that R k is independent of history given A k
    rw [cond_of_condIndepFun (by fun_prop)]
    · -- The conditional independence: R k ⊥ (Ys, T=k) | A k
      apply CondIndepFun.of_measurable_right (IsAlgEnvSeq.condIndepFun_reward_hist_action_action' h k (by grind))
      fun_prop
    · exact measurableSet_singleton _
    · fun_prop
    · -- Condition A k = a has non-zero prob
      refine fun h0 ↦ ht (measure_mono_null (fun ω hω ↦ ?_) h0)
      simp at hω; exact action_eq_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe hm hω.2
    · -- Result is ν a
      exact reward_cond_action h a k (by
        refine fun h0 ↦ ht (measure_mono_null (fun ω hω ↦ ?_) h0)
        simp at hω; exact action_eq_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe hm hω.2)

let X := rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)
  let Y := fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω
  let Z := fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1
  have hX : Measurable X := measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a (n + 1)
  have hY : Measurable Y := Measurable.pi_Iic (fun i ↦ measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a i)
  have hZ : Measurable Z := (measurable_stepsUntil h.measurable_A a (n + 1)).comp measurable_fst
  let W := fun ω ↦ (Y ω, Z ω)
  have hW : Measurable W := hY.prod_mk hZ
  have h_cond : condDistrib X W 𝔓' =ᵐ[(𝔓').map W] Kernel.const _ (ν a) := by
    refine (condDistrib_ae_eq_cond (μ := 𝔓') (X := X) hX hW).trans ?_
    rw [Filter.EventuallyEq, ae_iff_of_countable hW measurable_snd]
    rintro ⟨y, k⟩ hk
    rw [Measure.map_apply hW (measurableSet_singleton _)] at hk
    cases k with
    | top =>
      rw [Measure.map_congr (g := fun ω ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a)]
      · rw [cond_of_indepFun _ (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (measurableSet_singleton _)]
        · exact (hasLaw_Z a (n + 1)).map_eq
        · exact hk
        · have h_indep_stream : (fun ω ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a) ⟂ᵢ[𝔓'] (fun ω ↦ ω.2) :=
             (indepFun_eval_infinitePi_eval_infinitePi_neq _ _ _ (Nat.succ_ne_self n).symm).comp measurable_id measurable_snd
          refine h_indep_stream.comp measurable_id ?_
          exact Measurable.prod_mk (Measurable.pi_Iic (fun i ↦ measurable_rewardByCount_snd a i)) measurable_stepsUntil_snd
      · refine ae_cond_of_forall_mem ((measurableSet_singleton _).preimage hW) ?_
        rintro ω hω; simp at hω; exact rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_top
    | coe m =>
      rw [Measure.map_congr (g := fun ω ↦ R m ω.1)]
      swap
      · refine ae_cond_of_forall_mem ((measurableSet_singleton _).preimage hW) ?_
        rintro ω hω; simp at hω; exact rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe hω.2
      -- We need to show R m is independent of (Y, Z) given A m = a.
      -- The event W = (y, m) implies A m = a.
      -- Y and Z=m are measurable w.r.t. Hist (m-1) and A m.
      -- R m is independent of Hist (m-1) given A m.
      rw [cond_of_condIndepFun (by fun_prop)]
      · exact reward_cond_action h a m (measure_ne_zero_of_map_ne_zero hk)
      · exact (measurableSet_singleton _).preimage hW
      · exact hX
      · rw [Set.inter_comm, Set.inter_assoc]
        apply measure_mono_null (Set.inter_subset_left _ _)
        refine measure_mono_null ?_ (measure_eq_zero_of_map_eq_zero hk)
        intro ω hω; simp at hω ⊢; exact ⟨hω.1, action_eq_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe (by simp) hω.2⟩
      · have h_indep : R m ⟂ᵢ[A m, h.measurable_A m; P] fun ω ↦ (IsAlgEnvSeq.hist A R (m - 1) ω, A m ω) :=
          IsAlgEnvSeq.condIndepFun_reward_hist_action_action' h m (by grind)
        refine (condIndepFun_fst_prod (ν := Bandit.streamMeasure ν) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) h_indep).of_measurable_right ?_
        -- Show W is measurable w.r.t. Hist (m-1) x A m
        apply Measurable.prod_mk
        · apply Measurable.pi_Iic; intro i
          refine measurable_rewardByCount_of_le_stepsUntil ?_
          -- stepsUntil A a i <= stepsUntil A a (n+1) = m.
          -- This holds for i <= n.
          -- stepsUntil is non-decreasing in count index.
          exact (stepsUntil_mono (by simp) i.2).trans (measurable_stepsUntil_eq_coe a m (h.measurable_A m)).le
        · exact measurable_stepsUntil_eq_coe a m (h.measurable_A m)
  exact (IndepFun.of_condDistrib_eq h_cond).comp measurable_id measurable_fst

have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  let S := fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1
  let Ys := fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω
  let X := rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)
  have hX : Measurable X := measurable_rewardByCount hA hR a (n + 1)
  have hYs : Measurable Ys := measurable_pi_lambda _ fun i ↦ measurable_rewardByCount hA hR a i
  have hS : Measurable S := measurable_stepsUntil hA a (n + 1)
  rw [indepFun_iff_condDistrib_eq_const (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (hasLaw_rewardByCount h a (n+1) (by simp)).aemeasurable (hasLaw_rewardByCount h a (n+1) (by simp)).map_eq]
  rw [← Kernel.const_comp_eq_condDistrib (μ := 𝔓') (X := X) (Y := Ys) (Z := S) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  refine (condDistrib_ae_eq_cond (μ := 𝔓') (X := S) (Y := X) (Z := Ys) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).trans ?_
  rw [Filter.EventuallyEq, ae_iff_of_countable]
  intro k hk
  simp only [Kernel.const_apply]
  cases k with
  | top =>
    rw [Measure.map_congr (g := fun ω ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a)]
    swap
    · refine ae_cond_of_forall_mem ((measurableSet_singleton _).preimage hS) ?_
      simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
      exact fun ω ↦ rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_top
    rw [cond_of_indepFun _ (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (measurableSet_singleton _)]
    · exact (hasLaw_Z a (n + 1)).map_eq
    · rwa [Measure.map_apply (hS.prod_mk hYs) (measurableSet_singleton _)] at hk
    · exact indepFun_prod (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  | coe k =>
    rw [Measure.map_congr (g := fun ω ↦ R k ω.1)]
    swap
    · refine ae_cond_of_forall_mem ((measurableSet_singleton _).preimage hS) ?_
      simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
      exact fun ω ↦ rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe
    have h_indep : R k ⟂ᵢ[A k, hA k; P] fun ω ↦ (S ω = k, Ys ω) := by
      refine (IsAlgEnvSeq.condIndepFun_reward_hist_action_action' h k (by grind)).of_measurable_right (hX := hA k) ?_
      refine (measurable_comap_indicator_stepsUntil_eq hA hR a (n + 1) k).prod_mk ?_
      exact measurable_comap_rewardByCount_le hA hR a (n + 1) k (le_refl _) n (Nat.le_add_left _ _)
    rw [cond_of_condIndepFun (by fun_prop)]
    · exact reward_cond_action h a k (by simpa [action_eq_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe] using measure_mono_null (Set.inter_subset_left) hk)
    · exact h_indep
    · refine (measurableSet_singleton _).preimage hS
    · exact (measurableSet_singleton _).preimage hS |>.prod (measurableSet_singleton _ |>.preimage hYs)
    · convert hk using 1; ext ω; simp [Set.inter_comm]

have h_eq (k : ℕ) (hk : k ≠ 0) : rewardByCount A R a k =ᵐ[𝔓'] fun ω ↦ ω.2 k a :=
    rewardByCount_eq_stream_apply h a k
  refine IndepFun.congr (h_eq _ (Nat.succ_ne_zero _)) (ae_eq_fun_intro fun i ↦ ?_) ?_
  · if hi : i = 0 then simp [hi, rewardByCount_eq_zero] else exact h_eq i hi
  · have h_indep : iIndepFun (fun i ω ↦ ω.2 i a) 𝔓' := by
      rw [← iIndepFun_iff_pi_iIndepFun_map_snd]
      exact iIndepFun_eval_pi (fun _ ↦ Measure.infinitePi ν) a
    refine (h_indep.indepFun_eval (n + 1) (Iic n) (by simp)).comp measurable_id
      (measurable_pi_lambda _ fun i ↦ ?_)
    by_cases hi : i = 0 <;> simp [hi, measurable_const, measurable_id]

let Y := rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)
  let Z := fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω
  let T := fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1
  have hY : Measurable Y := measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a (n + 1)
  have hZ : Measurable Z := Measurable.pi_Iic (fun i ↦ measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a i)
  have hT : Measurable T := measurable_stepsUntil h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a (n + 1)
  rw [indepFun_iff_condDistrib_eq_const hY hZ]
  refine (condDistrib_of_is_cond_const hY hZ hT (ν a) ?_).trans ?_
  · intro t ht
    cases t with
    | top =>
      refine ae_cond_of_forall_mem ((measurableSet_singleton _).preimage hT) (fun ω hω ↦ ?_)
      rw [rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_top h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a (n+1) ω hω]
      rw [(hasLaw_Z a (n+1)).map_eq]
      refine (indepFun_iff_condDistrib_eq_const (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).mp ?_
      exact (indepFun_prod_snd (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).comp measurable_id (by fun_prop)
    | coe k =>
      refine ae_cond_of_forall_mem ((measurableSet_singleton _).preimage hT) (fun ω hω ↦ ?_)
      rw [rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe hω]
      have h_indep : R k ⟂ᵢ[A k, h.measurable_A k; P] fun ω ↦ (IsAlgEnvSeq.hist A R (k - 1) ω, A k ω) :=
        IsAlgEnvSeq.condIndepFun_reward_hist_action_action' h k (by grind)
      refine (indepFun_iff_condDistrib_eq_const (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).mp ?_
      refine h_indep.of_measurable_right (hX := h.measurable_A k) ?_
      simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hω
      have : A k ω.1 = a := action_eq_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe (by simp) hω
      refine (measurable_from_prod_countable' (fun i ↦ ?_) (measurableSet_singleton _)).comp
        (measurable_algEnvSeq_hist h (k-1) |>.prod_mk (h.measurable_A k))
      simp only [IsAlgEnvSeq.hist]
      rintro ⟨hist, action⟩ ⟨-, h_act⟩
      rw [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h_act
      subst h_act
      -- Z depends on history up to k-1 (since stepsUntil (n+1) = k, all i <= n occur at times < k)
      exact measurable_const
  · simp

have h_eq : ∀ k ≠ 0, rewardByCount A R a k =ᵐ[𝔓'] fun ω ↦ ω.2 (k - 1) a :=
    fun k hk ↦ rewardByCount_eq_stream_apply h a k hk
  refine IndepFun.congr ?_ ?_ ?_
  · exact (h_eq (n + 1) (Nat.succ_ne_zero n)).symm
  · refine Filter.Eventually.of_forall fun ω ↦ ?_
    funext ⟨i, hi⟩
    rcases eq_or_ne i 0 with rfl | hi0
    · simp [rewardByCount_zero]
    · simp only [h_eq i hi0]
  · have h_indep : iIndepFun (fun _ ↦ ℝ) (fun k ω ↦ ω.2 k a) 𝔓' := by
      rw [Bandit.streamMeasure]
      exact ((Measure.iIndepFun_infinitePi (fun _ ↦ Measure.infinitePi ν)).comp
        measurable_snd).comp (fun _ ↦ measurable_pi_apply a)
    refine (h_indep.indepFun_finset (Finset.range n)
      (fun i hi ↦ Finset.mem_range.mp hi)).comp measurable_id (by fun_prop)

have h_eq (k : ℕ) (hk : k ≠ 0) : rewardByCount A R a k =ᵐ[𝔓'] fun ω ↦ ω.2 k a := by
    have h_law : IdentDistrib (rewardByCount A R a k) (fun ω ↦ ω.2 k a) 𝔓' 𝔓' :=
      (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval h a k k hk).trans
      (identDistrib_eval_eval_id_streamMeasure ν k a)
    have h_eq_on : ∀ᵐ ω ∂𝔓', stepsUntil A a k ω.1 < ⊤ →
        rewardByCount A R a k ω = (fun ω ↦ ω.2 k a) ω := by
      filter_upwards with ω hω
      rw [rewardByCount_apply, stepsUntil_val, h.eq_env]
      simp only [stationaryEnv, hω, ↓reduceIte, counts_stepsUntil_eq_self]
    exact h_law.ae_eq_of_ae_eq_on_open h_eq_on (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  refine IndepFun.congr ?_ (h_eq (n + 1) (by simp)) ?_
  · let Z (k : ℕ) := fun (ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ)) ↦ ω.2 k a
    have h_indep : IndepFun (Z (n + 1)) (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ Z i ω) 𝔓' := by
      rw [IndepFun_iff_measure_inter_preimage_eq_mul]
      intro s t hs ht
      have h_meas : Measurable (Z (n + 1)) := by fun_prop
      have h_meas_vec : Measurable (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ Z i ω) := by fun_prop
      rw [Measure.map_apply h_meas hs, Measure.map_apply h_meas_vec ht,
        Measure.map_apply (h_meas.prod_mk h_meas_vec) (hs.prod ht)]
      -- The independence follows from the product structure of the stream measure
      exact Bandit.streamMeasure_indep ν a (n + 1) (Set.Iic n) (fun i hi ↦ by simp at hi; linarith) s t hs ht
    exact h_indep
  · refine Filter.EventuallyEq.fun_comp _ _; intro i
    by_cases hi : i = 0
    · simp [hi, rewardByCount_zero]
    · exact h_eq i hi

let M := n + 1
  let T := fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a M ω.1
  let Y := fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω
  let X := rewardByCount A R a M
  have hX : HasLaw X (ν a) 𝔓' := hasLaw_rewardByCount h a M (by simp [M])
  have h_cond : condDistrib X (fun ω ↦ (Y ω, T ω)) 𝔓' =ᵐ[(𝔓').map (fun ω ↦ (Y ω, T ω))] Kernel.const _ (ν a) := by
    refine (condDistrib_ae_eq_cond (μ := 𝔓') (X := fun ω ↦ (Y ω, T ω)) (Y := X) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).trans ?_
    rw [Filter.EventuallyEq, ae_iff_of_countable_snd (by fun_prop)]
    rintro m hm
    have hm0 : m ≠ 0 := by
      intro h; rw [h] at hm; simp [T, stepsUntil_eq_zero_iff, M] at hm
      exact (measure_mono_null (Set.prod_subset_preimage_snd _ _) hm) (by
        rw [Measure.map_apply (by fun_prop) (measurableSet_prod.mpr (Or.inl ⟨MeasurableSet.univ, measurableSet_singleton _⟩))]; simpa using hm)
    cases m with | top => simp at hm0 | coe m =>
    simp only [Kernel.const_apply]
    rw [Measure.map_congr (g := fun ω ↦ R m ω.1)]
    swap
    · refine ae_cond_of_forall_mem ((measurableSet_singleton _).preimage (by fun_prop)) ?_
      exact fun _ ↦ rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe
    rw [cond_of_condIndepFun (by fun_prop)]
    · refine (IsAlgEnvSeq.condIndepFun_reward_hist_action_action' h m (by grind)).of_measurable_right ?_
      apply Measurable.comap_le
      refine (measurable_indicator_stepsUntil_eq h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a M m).snd.prod_mk ?_
      -- Y is measurable with respect to history at m-1 because all stepsUntil are < m
      have : ∀ i : Iic n, T i < m := fun i ↦
        (stepsUntil_strict_mono h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a (i.2.trans_lt (Nat.lt_succ_self n)) (by simp [M])).trans_le (le_of_eq (by simp))
      fun_prop
    · exact measurableSet_eq_fun (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
    · fun_prop
    · rw [Measure.map_apply (by fun_prop) (measurableSet_eq_fun (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop))]
      convert hm
      ext x
      simp [Kernel.const_apply, Set.indicator_apply]
  rw [indepFun_iff_condDistrib_eq hX.aemeasurable (Measurable.aemeasurable (by fun_prop))]
  exact h_cond.map_prod_right (fun x ↦ x.1) (by fun_prop)

have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  let T := fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1
  let Z := rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)
  let Y := fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω
  have hT : Measurable T := (measurable_stepsUntil hA a (n + 1)).comp measurable_fst
  have hZ : Measurable Z := measurable_rewardByCount hA hR a (n + 1)
  have hY : Measurable Y := Measurable.pi_Iic (fun i _ ↦ measurable_rewardByCount hA hR a i)
  rw [indepFun_iff_map_prod_eq_prod_map_map hZ hY, (hasLaw_rewardByCount h a (n + 1) (by simp)).map_eq]
  rw [Measure.map_eq_sum_map_restrict hT (hZ.prod_mk hY), Measure.prod_eq_sum_prod_restrict hT hY]
  congr with t
  by_cases ht : 𝔓' (T ⁻¹' {t}) = 0
  · simp [Measure.map_restrict_of_null ht, Measure.restrict_eq_zero.mpr ht]
  · cases t with
    | top =>
      have h_eq : Z =ᵐ[𝔓'[|T ⁻¹' {⊤}]] fun ω ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a := by
        filter_upwards [ae_restrict_mem (measurableSet_preimage hT (measurableSet_singleton ⊤))] with ω hω
        simp only [Z, T, Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hω ⊢
        rw [rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_top _ _ _ _ hω]
      rw [Measure.map_congr h_eq, Measure.map_congr h_eq]
      rw [Measure.map_prod_eq_prod_map_of_indepFun_of_map_fst_eq_const (μ := 𝔓'[|T ⁻¹' {⊤}]) (ν := ν a)]
      · have : (fun ω ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a) ⟂ᵢ[𝔓'] Prod.mk Y T := by
          refine (indepFun_prod (X := fun ω : Ω ↦ T ω) (Y := fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ ω (n+1) a) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).symm.comp (by fun_prop) measurable_snd
        exact (this.indepFun_restrict (measurableSet_preimage hT (measurableSet_singleton ⊤))).comp measurable_fst (hY.prod_mk hT)
      · rw [Measure.map_restrict_ae_eq_restrict hT (measurableSet_singleton ⊤) (by fun_prop) h_eq]
        exact (hasLaw_Z a (n + 1)).map_eq_restrict (measurableSet_preimage hT (measurableSet_singleton ⊤))
          ((indepFun_prod (X := fun ω : Ω ↦ T ω) (Y := fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ ω (n+1) a) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).symm)
    | coe t =>
      have h_eq : Z =ᵐ[𝔓'[|T ⁻¹' {t}]] fun ω ↦ R t ω.1 := by
        filter_upwards [ae_restrict_mem (measurableSet_preimage hT (measurableSet_singleton t))] with ω hω
        simp only [Z, T, Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hω ⊢
        rw [rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe _ _ _ _ hω]
      rw [Measure.map_congr h_eq, Measure.map_congr h_eq]
      rw [Measure.map_prod_eq_prod_map_of_indepFun_of_map_fst_eq_const (μ := 𝔓'[|T ⁻¹' {t}]) (ν := ν a)]
      · refine reward_cond_stepsUntil h a (n + 1) t (by simp) (by rwa [ne_eq, Measure.restrict_eq_zero] at ht)
      · rw [indepFun_iff_condIndepFun_eq_map (μ := 𝔓') (m := (measurableSet_preimage hT (measurableSet_singleton t))) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (by rwa [Measure.restrict_eq_zero] at ht)]
